raw_response: I agree with the selection of Option C - Fresh Frozen Plasma (FFP) as it offers several advantages for factor VIII replacement beyond just providing Factor VIII itself. Comprehensive coverage includes all crucial coagulation factors which can be beneficial especially if there's underlying deficiency in additional factors not yet recognized during treatment initiation. Additionally, using FFP helps reduce exposure to potential allergens and contaminants more commonly found in single-component concentrates like cryoprecipitate, further enhancing patient safety. Thus, my agreement solidifies around selecting FFPC: Fresh Frozen Plasma.
